title: Course: COSC 462 - Introduction to Database Security
description: Focuses on security knowledge integration within organizations. Covers secure network protocol design, vulnerability discovery, ACID testing, and system vulnerability effects. Details protocols including TCP/IP, SSL/TLS, IPsec, SSH, firewalls, password policies, privileges, roles, Virtual Private Databases, and auditing. Advanced topics encompass SQL injection and DBMS security issues.
prerequisites_text: COSC 459 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 462 - Introduction to Database Security
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 459 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: As needed

Description: Focuses on security knowledge integration within organizations. Covers secure network protocol design, vulnerability discovery, ACID testing, and system vulnerability effects. Details protocols including TCP/IP, SSL/TLS, IPsec, SSH, firewalls, password policies, privileges, roles, Virtual Private Databases, and auditing. Advanced topics encompass SQL injection and DBMS security issues.
